source_family_weights.rationale: Bias slightly toward explanatory architecture prose so the lane explains systems decisions instead of only restating specs.
Keep strong specification coverage without letting normative boilerplate crowd out explanation quality.

source_contribution_caps.rationale: The current prose anchor may lead but may not exceed the declared prose ceiling.
The primary specification anchor may not exceed the declared spec-text ceiling.

repetitive_region_controls.rationale: Repeated micro-operation passages stay visible but are down-weighted so they do not flatten prose variety.
Validation-context boilerplate is retained for grounding while being prevented from dominating the spec slice.

regression_thresholds.rationale: Explanatory quality may not regress materially when the mixture changes.
Specification interpretation is a core Psion bar.
Tradeoff reasoning must remain stable across mixture updates.
Invariant articulation must not erode under corpus expansion.
Coding fluency is tracked, but it does not outrank reasoning quality.
